title: US launches new wave of strikes against Iran as Tehran says diplomacy has proven ‘futile’
summary_full: American and Iranian forces exchange heavy missile and drone attacks over control of strait of Hormuz, increasing pressure on truceUS and Iranian military forces exchanged heavy missile and drone attacks over the weekend and into Monday, as Tehran ⁠targeted US bases in the region and announced it was denying passage of ships through the ​strait of Hormuz.Iran’s Revolutionary Guards (IRGC) said it had targeted US military facilities in Bahrain and Kuwait, destroyed radar systems in Oman and hit fuel tanks and ammunition depots at Prince Hassan airbase in Jordan in response to ⁠US strikes. Continue reading...
